_notes: Keyed by CRS code (matches naptan_stations.crs). Lat/lon/tiploc already live in Postgres — don't duplicate here. Google Map / Street View links are NOT stored; construct at render time from naptan_stations lat/lon using: https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query={lat},{lon} and https://www.google.com/maps/@?api=1&map_action=pano&viewpoint={lat},{lon}. Any field can be null/empty until curated — sidebar should hide empty fields, not show placeholders.
